claim_text: Sleep breathing monitoring accounts for 49.9% of all overseas discussion.
denominator_scope: product-labeled records, not all raw social records
recommended_fix: Rewrite as: Within 12,489 product-labeled records, sleep breathing monitoring appears in 6,230 records, or 49.9%.

claim_text: Fitbit has the best brand reputation because its positive sentiment rate is 66.7%.
recommended_fix: Downgrade to a case-level signal; do not rank brand reputation from 3 comments.

claim_text: TikTok users are young seed users who are best targeted with trendy product positioning.
recommended_fix: Rewrite as a platform discussion hypothesis and require platform x label x content type x sentiment x engagement evidence.

claim_text: Sleep comfort has the highest negative rate at 52.3%, while night physiological monitoring has the second-highest negative rate at 69.6%.
recommended_fix: Separate highest negative rate from largest negative volume and business priority.

claim_text: Shokz can position its product as a comfortable CPAP replacement with medical-grade accuracy.
denominator_scope: strategy claim not supported by comment evidence
recommended_fix: Rewrite as: low-burden auxiliary monitoring and trend documentation for CPAP users, pending accuracy and clinical-boundary validation.
